use_cases: Landing page hero visuals with animated abstract art
Background ambient animations for creative portfolios
Visual element for media and entertainment platforms
Decorative animated elements for dev-tool landing pages
Interactive art installations for digital experiences
ai_summary: A generative art component that renders animated visual content on canvas elements. Features multiple scene variations including velocity-based animations, circular motion, and randomized visual patterns. Creates continuously animating abstract visuals suitable for hero sections, ambient backgrounds, or decorative elements on creative and SaaS platforms.
